nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: Alice de Dunbar was born about 1069, in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom. She married Alain de Damoys in 1089, in Neuville, Orne, Lower Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1101, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice de Dunbar родилась около 1069 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alain de Damoys в 1089 г. в местности неувилл, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1101 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.
